steps.title: Place the modified person
steps.content: The opening phrase, one of the few African American global explorers, describes a person. The noun immediately after the comma should therefore be the person being described: Matthew Henson.

steps.title: Avoid dangling modifiers
steps.content: B makes the years 1891 and 1909 appear to be the explorers being described. C incorrectly attaches the description to Greenland. D incorrectly attaches it to several treks. The remaining choice places Matthew Henson right after the modifier and makes him the subject of the sentence. The answer is A.
